title: Hotel Project
subtitle: Centralized Hotel Management System
description: A comprehensive hotel management platform designed to streamline room bookings, check-in/check-out workflows, housekeeping management, billing, and guest relationship tracking. Features real-time availability dashboards and role-based access for staff, managers, and administrators.
highlights: Architected the room inventory and booking engine with conflict detection
Built real-time housekeeping status board with WebSocket integration
Implemented role-based access with granular permissions

title: E-commerce Project
subtitle: Scalable Online Retail Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce platform built for scalability, supporting product catalog management, shopping cart, secure checkout with multiple payment gateways, order tracking, inventory management, and an admin dashboard with analytics.
highlights: Designed the product variant system handling thousands of SKUs
Integrated Stripe and PayPal payment gateways with webhook handling
Built admin analytics dashboard with Chart.js visualizations

title: Gym Project
subtitle: Member Management & Class Scheduling
description: A gym management system handling member registrations, membership plans, class scheduling, trainer assignments, attendance tracking, and payment collection. Includes a member-facing portal for booking classes and viewing workout history.
highlights: Built the class scheduling engine with recurring booking support
Implemented SMS notifications via Twilio for class reminders
Created a member check-in system with QR code scanning

title: ShowLike Project
subtitle: Entertainment Discovery & Rating Platform
description: A social entertainment discovery platform where users can browse movies, TV series, and shows, write reviews, rate content, create watchlists, and follow other users. Features personalized recommendations based on viewing preferences and rating history.
highlights: Integrated The Movie Database (TMDB) API for rich content metadata
Built a recommendation engine using collaborative filtering
Designed the review and rating system with moderation tools

title: Smoove Project
subtitle: Comprehensive Travel Booking System
description: An all-in-one travel booking platform for flights, hotels, and ground transit. Features multi-city search, fare comparison, booking management, itinerary planning, and a loyalty rewards program. Handles complex pricing rules and real-time availability checks.
highlights: Integrated Amadeus travel API for flight and hotel inventory
Built the multi-step booking flow with session persistence
Developed the dynamic pricing engine with discount rules
